a_image.alt: Polaris (Shopify) style mood board — Shopify · Polaris Design

sections.a_eyebrow: Professional · E-commerce · Modular Layout · Clean UI · Modern
sections.a_description: Merchant-focused, action-oriented, and designed to make commerce manageable — Polaris is Shopify's design system that powers the dashboards where millions of entrepreneurs run their businesses. The signature green accent says 'go, sell, grow,' while the practical card layouts and readable typography help merchants navigate complex business operations without a design degree.

This commerce-optimized design system powers the Shopify admin, Shopify POS, and the ecosystem of apps that millions of merchants rely on daily. You'll see it on order management screens, product editors, analytics dashboards, and every surface where Shopify merchants interact with their business data — a design language optimized for getting real commercial work done.

The practical, merchant-focused aesthetic of Shopify's Polaris design system — approachable, action-oriented, and designed to help millions of merchants manage their businesses. Background: light gray (#f6f6f7). The .inner panel has a white background (#ffffff) with a 1px border (#e1e3e5) and 8px border-radius — Polaris's clean card component. Box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.05). Colors: Shopify green (#008060) as the primary action color — the green of commerce, growth, and 'add to cart'. Near-black (#202223) for headings, dark gray (#6d7175) for body text. The aesthetic is workbench-practical — every element helps merchants do something, no decoration without function. Set in Inter — chosen for its excellent readability at small sizes and its ability to render consistently across platforms. Heading at weight 600, 20px, line-height 1.4, color #202223. Eyebrow at weight 500, 12px, uppercase, 0.5px letter-spacing, color #008060. Body at weight 400, 14px, line-height 1.5, color #6d7175. Buttons: primary — green (#008060), white text, 8px border-radius. Secondary: white, gray border, 8px border-radius. Alternatives: SF Pro (Apple ecosystem), Roboto (Android merchants).
{What this palette represents — the core identity}
